title: Aehr Test Systems Reports Over $37 Million in Quarterly Bookings
text: Aehr Test Systems reported over $37 million in quarterly bookings for Q3 fiscal 2026, driven by strong demand for AI and data center infrastructure solutions. Quarterly bookings reached $37.2 million with a book-to-bill ratio exceeding 3.5x. Backlog totaled $38.7 million with effective backlog including subsequent bookings reaching $50.9 million. CEO Gayn Erickson stated: We are very pleased with the strong momentum in our business across multiple market segments, highlighted by more than $37 million in quarterly bookings. He emphasized accelerating demand across both wafer-level and package-level burn-in applications for advanced semiconductor devices. Management expects second-half fiscal 2026 bookings at the high end of the previously stated $60–$80 million range and full-year revenue on the high side of the $45–$50 million range. The strong bookings reflect significant customer wins in AI processor testing and data center semiconductor applications.
